title: limnanthemum gunnii
intro: Limnanthemum gunnii, also known as the water violet or Australian water violet, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be applied to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Limnanthemum gunnii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
